after_cancel_access: After cancellation, access stays until the end of the paid period
avatar_hint: Hover the avatar to replace it
cancel_until_year_end: Cancel. It stays active until the end of the year
cancelled_desc: All Pro features stay available until that date. Then the account switches to Free.
cancelled_note: After the period ends, access to the AI assistant, booking recognition and calendar disappears in trips without a separate Pro subscription
channel_push_desc: Phone push via the mobile app.
channels_desc: Where to send trip event reminders. More channels coming soon.
confirm_delete_desc_1: This is irreversible. Type the word
delete_blocked_desc: You have an active Pro subscription. Account deletion is blocked until it is closed.
delete_desc: Irreversible. All your trips, documents and chat history will be deleted.
err_delete_failed: Could not delete the account. Try again later or contact support.
err_delete_unauthorized: Your session has expired. Sign in again and retry.
err_portal_iframe: To manage the subscription, open Triplanio in a separate tab
err_portal_open: Could not open the billing portal. Try later.
free_desc: 1 active trip · no AI assistant, booking recognition or calendar section
logout_desc: You'll need to sign in again to open your trips. Local drafts are kept.
notif_invites_desc: When you are added to a new trip
notif_updates_desc: Changes in trips where you are a participant
title: Account settings
yearly_note: The yearly plan is billed once a year, not monthly
